relations.note: Charts/tables override the asymmetric accent-shape radius with uniform 12px corners.
Consistency-of-orientation rule refines how the accent-shape radius pairs are applied within an email.

quotes: Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

rules.intent: Establish the signature accent-shape container device with approved size-specific radius pairs.
rules.rule_text: The Brand Accent Shape is a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (the other two corners keep a slight radius), used to house callout text and photography to read modern and optimistic. Use the approved radius pairs by container size — print: large containers/photos 1.25" & 0.0625", banners 0.5" & 0.0625", small callout boxes 0.4375" & 0.0625"; email (at 96dpi): large 120px & 6px, banner 48px & 6px, callout 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right) and the 6px radius to the other pair.

quotes: Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency of the accent shape across a single email.
rules.rule_text: Be consistent within an email: use the same diagonal orientation of the accent-shape radius pairs across all sections. Default: large radius top-left & bottom-right.

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Distinguish data containers from the branded asymmetric accent shape for readability.
rules.rule_text: Exception to the accent shape: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (12px uniform radius), not the asymmetric accent shape.
